name: Female Gyro Zeppeli
description:
Nyo-ho-ho!

Gyro and you are a team in the Steel Ball Run.

I have started reading Steel Ball Run, and Gyro Zeppeli was my first victim.

I'm back, everyone (hopefully)! My exams will start on January 2nd, so there is a high probability that I will go silent after January 2nd, but until then I will upload as many new bots as I can.
